授業方法: General course format:This is NOT a lecture class. Lessons are highly student-centered involving individual, pair, and group work. Students are expected to actively contribute to the class, as well as complete their assignments in a timely manner before each class. This course will be taught in English only, and students are expected to use English as much as possible.

第1回:
【Startup Week】

【Flex Hours】《60 minutes》
        - Watch introduction/orientation/course overview video "Online class（On-demand format）"
        - Respond to pre class survey "Online class（Task-oriented format）"
        - Make an introduction about yourself and set language learning goals "Online class（Task-oriented format）"
第2回:
【Core Weeks①】《90 minutes》"Face-to-face class"

- Diagnostic test
- Listening skills overview and practice: Main idea questions
第3回:
【Core Weeks②】《90 minutes》"Face-to-face class"

-  Listening skills practice: Detail questions
第4回:
【Core Weeks③】《90 minutes》"Face-to-face class"

- Listening skills practice: function questions
第5回:
【Core Weeks④】《90 minutes》"Face-to-face class"

- Listening skills practice: stance  and organisation questions

【Flex Hours】《60 minutes》

- Watch a TED talk video "Online class（On-demand format）"
 - Complete listening practice worksheet and speaking practice exercise "Online class（Task-oriented   format）"
第6回:
【Core Weeks⑤】《90 minutes》"Face-to-face class"

- Listening skills practice: content questions
第7回:
【Core Weeks⑥】《90 minutes》"Face-to-face class"

-  Listening skills practice: inference questions
第8回:
【Core Weeks⑦】《90 minutes》"Face-to-face class"

- Listening review test
第9回:
【Core Weeks⑧】《90 minutes》"Face-to-face class"

- Speaking skills overview and practice: Independent tasks

【Flex Hours】《60 minutes》

- Watch a TED talk video "Online class（On-demand format）"
- Complete listening practice worksheet and speaking practice exercise "Online class（Task-oriented   format）"
第10回:
【Core Weeks⑨】《90 minutes》"Face-to-face class"

- Speaking skills practice: independent tasks
第11回:
【Core Weeks⑩】《90 minutes》"Face-to-face class"

- Speaking skills practice: Integrated tasks
第12回:
【Core Weeks⑪】《90 minutes》"Face-to-face class"

- Speaking skills practice: Integrated tasks
第13回:
【Core Weeks⑫】《90 minutes》"Face-to-face class"

- Final test
第14回:
【Classes and examinations period】

【Flex Hours】《90 minutes》

- Watch a term reflection video "Online class（On-demand format）"
- Respond to post class survey "Online class（Task-oriented format）"
- Make a video reflecting on your progress/ weaknesses"Online class（Task-oriented format）
トピック.授業計画1: Please note that the weekly schedule above is for information purposes and may change throughout the semester. Any change will be announced to students in due time.
トピック.授業外学習2: Review each lesson and complete the regular homework assignments in order to be prepared for the following class.  This should take approximately two hours per class lesson.

教科書/Required texts1: Paul Edmunds, Nancy McKinnon, Jeff Zeter
Developing Skills for the TOEFL IBT Listening 3rd Edition
